meaning: adj.精确的,准确的,原样的,精密的,严格vt.强求,急需,要求
examples: I don't remember the exact words.
What is the exact location of the ship?
The exact length of each period may vary.

As the canal was finished in 1882, Shakespeare would probably not have taken this exact route.
